parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id,
  c.full_name,
  c.email,
  c.phone,
  c.budget_max,
  c.lead_tier,
  c.lead_score AS current_score,
  c.source,
  c.created_at,
  c.last_contact_at,
  COUNT(a.id) AS total_activities,
  MAX(a.created_at) AS latest_activity,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.type = 'visit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS visit_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.type = 'inquiry' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inquiry_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.type = 'whatsapp_reply' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reply_count
FROM contacts c
LEFT JOIN activities a ON a.contact_id = c.id
WHERE c.status IN ('lead', 'prospect', 'qualified', 'active')
GROUP BY c.id
ORDER BY c.lead_score DESC
LIMIT 200
UPDATE contacts SET lead_score = {{ $json.new_score }}, lead_tier = '{{ $json.tier }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.contact_id }}'
